code_value: Hi, my name is Amy. I'm from Canada, and I study in Foshan. People here are really friendly. I take art lessons at school, and now I'm learning Chinese painting. I enjoy playing basketball with my friend Lily. I'm also in the school basketball team. We'll have an important game next week, so we train hard every afternoon. Our coach is proud because we're improving a lot. I believe we can win the game this time!
